---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help improve Aura
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear description of what went wrong.

**Steps to reproduce**
1. Go to '...'
2. Tap on '...'
3. See error

**Expected behavior**
What you expected to happen.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots.

**Device info**
- Device: [e.g. Pixel 8, iPhone 15]
- OS version: [e.g. Android 15, iOS 18]
- Aura version: [e.g. v0.2.0]
- Model: [e.g. Gemma 4 E2B]

**Additional context**
Any other details (character card format, file size, network conditions, etc.).
